name: copilot-connector-workflow
description: End-to-end orchestrator + GUI: dataset -> eval set -> enhanced records -> schema -> Copilot Connector project -> Azure deploy artifacts.

scripts.smoke: node dist/cli.js run --dataset "..\EvaluationCLI\environment-datasets" --description "Environmental datasets for the NGO environment Copilot connector, including OWID CO2/GHG metrics plus World Bank climate indicators by country/region and year." --count 10 --connector-id ccwenvtest --connector-name "CCW Env Test" --mode build
